title: C++ compile error on incorrect assignment to clocking in virtual interface

features.name: virtual interface with clocking block access
features.description: Code should include a virtual interface declaration and access to a clocking block signal within that interface using dot notation

features.name: dynamic array declaration
features.description: Code should include a dynamic array declaration using empty subscript syntax

features.name: assignment to clocking block output signal
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment to a clocking block output signal through a virtual interface
